name: thumbforge-ai
description: ThumbForge AI - SaaS para criação de thumbnails com IA

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@thumbforge/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,backend,worker,frontend "npm run dev --workspace=@thumbforge/shared" "npm run dev --workspace=@thumbforge/backend" "npm run worker:dev --workspace=@thumbforge/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=@thumbforge/frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n backend,worker,frontend "npm run start --workspace=@thumbforge/backend" "npm run worker:start --workspace=@thumbforge/backend" "npm run start --workspace=@thumbforge/frontend"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
